label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 19

extraction.one_line_summary: DAINESE Alberto took a messy sprint finish after a late crash at 2.3km swept away lead-out trains including Groves, with Ganna missing by 3/4 bike length.
tactical_patterns: Alpecin controlled entire stage with sub-2-minute leash on break, treating it like pure leadout for Groves green jersey consolidation.
Late crash at 2.3km right-hander on wide highway eliminated DSM organization, proving road width creates lateral movement risk zones.
Dainese won without leadout train after crash disruption, suggesting his individual positioning skill exceeds perceived sprint dependence on setup.

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: neutral: prioritized intermediate sprint points over stage win positioning, revealing green jersey calculation dominance over stage hunting
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: challenged for sprint victory despite track specialist profile, showing late-race speed reserves beyond time trial reputation
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: skipped intermediate sprint contest with Groves despite green jersey competition still mathematical, signaling Stage 20 prioritization
rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: executed self-sufficient sprint finish without team setup after crash, demonstrating tactical adaptability beyond pure leadout dependency
